item.title: PaddlePaddle / PaddleDetection
item.description:

item.title: PaddlePaddle / PaddleSeg
item.description:

Lang: Python

item.title: PaddlePaddle / PaddleSpeech
item.description:

Lang: Python

item.title: commaai / openpilot
item.description:
Desc: openpilot is an open source driver assistance system. openpilot performs the functions of Automated Lane Centering and Adaptive Cruise Control for over 200 supported car makes and models.
Lang: Python
